Item Class: Rings
Rarity: Unique
The Taming
Prismatic Ring
--------
Quality (Fire Modifiers): +20% (augmented)
--------
Requires: Level 42
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Corruption Enhancement — Attribute }
+11(10-15) to Intelligence
--------
{ Implicit Modifier — Elemental, Fire, Cold, Lightning, Resistance — 20% Increased }
+9(7-10)% to all Elemental Resistances
--------
{ Unique Modifier — Elemental, Fire, Cold, Lightning, Resistance — 20% Increased }
+17(10-20)% to all Elemental Resistances
{ Unique Modifier — Elemental, Fire, Cold, Lightning — 20% Increased }
19(10-20)% increased Damage for each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy
{ Unique Modifier — Elemental }
Wind Skills which can be boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces can be boosted by multiple Elemental Ground Surfaces — Unscalable Value
Wind Skills which can be boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces count
as being boosted by Ignited, Shocked, and Chilled Ground — Unscalable Value
--------
"Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed
--------
Corrupted
